exercise_requirement: Use at least one model-independent method such as occlusion, masking, crop-and-retest, or perturbation to identify influential regions.
research_question: Do image models rely on plausible part regions rather than backgrounds or collection shortcuts?
hypothesis: Correct predictions will depend on housings, connectors, openings, filters, lenses, or mounting details rather than background alone.
random_seed_policy: primary seed 42; retained comparisons repeat seeds 42, 43, and 44
safety_notes: Do not load, inspect, score, or tune against the locked test split.
